ddt:Target.Name: FrontCamera_SUV_SW7p3_V1
ddt:Target.Description:
7p3_V1 15/03/2021 Created starting from official 7p2_V3 updated auto-ident 7.3 Splitted screen config and coding Removed LDW param from config screen Created screen for AHL ADB, removing button from config screen 16/04/2021 Removed DID E003 since not anymore a DID, only supplier
7p2_V3 updated screen heater with flat requests and read 205A
7p2_V2 Added flat requests R_AFS for aftersales. ADT
7p2_V1 09/02/2021 Created from SW7p1_V7, adding screen for hashes Removed autoidentg SW7.1 and added new autoident SW7.2 added DID Heater_Element_speedStrategy as per DFC32 corrected received response request resetFDxx
2021-6-3 Identification added by tool (CORP\a008229) => DiagVersion=96, Supplier=ZF , Soft=SW7.3_B , Version=000000000

Data.Name: Aiming_Done
Data.Comment: Status of the routine, TAC2 and SPC.

Data.Name: Aiming_Result
Data.Comment: Status of the Alignment, TAC2 and SPC

Data.Name: Check_Routine_Result_Yaw
Data.Comment: Actual aiming result compared with facory one

Data.Name: Check_Routine_Result_Roll
Data.Comment: Actual aiming result compared with facory one

Data.Name: Check_Routine_Result_Pitch
Data.Comment: Actual aiming result compared with facory one

Data.Name: Last_Aiming_Result_Yaw
Data.Comment: Aiming Yaw Result (For Normal Mode, this result for Yaw.) Refer to FrontCamera_Aiming_Flow_for C1

Data.Name: Last_Aiming_Result_Roll
Data.Comment: Aiming Roll Result (For Normal Mode, this result for Roll.) *Refer to FrontCamera_Aiming_Flow_for

Data.Name: Last_Aiming_Result_Pitch
Data.Comment: Aiming Pitch Result (For Normal Mode, this result for Pitch.) *Refer to FrontCamera_Aiming_Flow_fo

Data.Name: DID_Dev.Dev_frames_TargetSimulationMode
Data.Comment: Select Target Simulation Mode

Item.Text: Fusion track simulation on CAN - Polar Co-ordinates
Fusion track simulation on CAN - Cartesean Co-ordinates

Data.Name: DID_Dev.Dev_frames_Communication_Interface_Version
Data.Comment: Activate/deactivate the frame

Data.Name: DID_Dev.Number_of_tracks
Data.Comment: Number of tracks frames sent on the CAN.

Data.Name: DID_Dev.targets
Data.Comment: Activate/deactivate the frames

Data.Name: DID_Dev.Debug_frames_simulink
Data.Comment: Activate/desactivate the frames

Data.Name: DID_Dev.Debug_frames_Supplier
Data.Comment: Activate/desactivate the frames if some

Data.Name: DID_Dev.LineDetectionSimulationMode
Data.Comment: Allow to activate/deactivate the LineDetectionSimulationMode.

Data.Name: DID_Dev.LSS_LaneInformation
Data.Comment: Activate/desactivate debug frames related to lane.

Data.Name: DID_Dev.LSS_InternalData
Data.Comment: Activate/desactivate the internal model debug frames.

Data.Name: DID_Dev.OSP
Data.Comment: Activate/desactivate the frame

Data.Name: Safety_Monitoring.ITS_CAN_CRC_Enable
Data.Comment: To activate/Deactivate CRC

Data.Name: Dev_Reaction_Mask.BCM
Data.Comment: To activate/deactivate DTC AND reactivity on specific frames

Data.Name: Dev_Reaction_Mask.ECM
Data.Comment: To activate/deactivate DTC AND reactivity on specific frames

Data.Name: Dev_Reaction_Mask.VDC
Data.Comment: To activate/deactivate DTC AND reactivity on specific frames

Data.Name: Dev_Reaction_Mask.Meter
Data.Comment: To activate/deactivate DTC AND reactivity on specific frames

Data.Name: Dev_Reaction_Mask.4WS
Data.Comment: To activate/deactivate DTC AND reactivity on specific frames

Data.Name: Dev_Reaction_Mask.IVI
Data.Comment: To activate/deactivate DTC AND reactivity on specific frames

Data.Name: Dev_Reaction_Mask.ADAS
Data.Comment: To activate/deactivate DTC AND reactivity on specific frames

Data.Name: Dev_Reaction_Mask.ATCU
Data.Comment: To activate/deactivate DTC AND reactivity on specific frames

Data.Name: Dev_Reaction_Mask.HEVC
Data.Comment: To activate/deactivate DTC AND reactivity on specific frames

Data.Name: Dev_Reaction_Mask.CDM
Data.Comment: To activate/deactivate DTC AND reactivity on specific frames

Data.Name: Dev_Reaction_Mask.Airbag
Data.Comment: To activate/deactivate DTC AND reactivity on specific frames

Data.Name: Dev_Reaction_Mask.USM
Data.Comment: To activate/deactivate DTC AND reactivity on specific frames

Data.Name: Dev_Reaction_Mask.SWA
Data.Comment: To activate/deactivate DTC AND reactivity on specific frames

Data.Name: Systems_Config.AEB_Configuration
Data.Comment: This parameter defines if the vehicle is fitted with AEB function.

Data.Name: Systems_Config.ACC_Configuration
Data.Comment: This parameter defines if the vehicle is fitted with ACC function.

Data.Name: Calib_Config_finished.ConfigStatus
Data.Comment: This parameter defines if the ECU is configured or not. By default, this value is equal to 0. This p

Data.Name: Coding_state
Data.Comment: coding status on plant after config/calib

Data.Name: Radnav.Radnav_configuration_status
Data.Comment: This parameter defines if the vehicle is fitted with Radio Navigation or Not. Allows to choose betwe

Data.Name: Heater_Element.Activation
Data.Comment: Activation of heater Element. It is activated by IOControl

Data.Name: Heater_System.Heater_System_Presence
Data.Comment: This parameter defines if the vehicle is fitted with Heater system, heater windshield or Nothing.

Data.Name: Heater_System.Tdegiv_cam_max
Data.Comment: This parameter defines the maximum time the system will be activate

Data.Name: Heater_System.TempExt_max
Data.Comment: This parameter defines the maximum external temperature to activate/deactivate the heater element

Data.Name: Heater_System.TempExt_activation
Data.Comment: This parameter defines the temperature to activate/deactivate the heater element. If the external te

Data.Name: Heater_System.CycleMaxNbr
Data.Comment: This parameter defines the temperature to activate/deactivate the heater element. If the external te

Data.Name: Supply_voltage
Data.Comment: Current value of Supply voltage.

Data.Name: Coding_type
Data.Comment: How the routine is launched

Data.Name: Vehicle_config.Engine_Type
Data.Comment: define the type of engine ( ICE, PHEV, HEV, EV)

Data.Name: Vehicle_config.OEM
Data.Comment: Identifies if the vehicle is a Renault or a Nissan one.

Data.Name: Vehicle_config.Object_type
Data.Comment: TSR, used to define the vehicle category according EU categorization

Data.Name: Vehicle_config.P_sys_x_FourWheelSteering
Data.Comment: Parameter allowing to enable (1) or deactivate (0) the rear wheel steering frame check.

Data.Name: Vehicle_config.P_sys_x_LeftRightSteeringWheel
Data.Comment: This parameter indicates if the vehicle is left or right hand side.

Data.Name: Vehicle_config.P_sys_m_VehicleWidth
Data.Comment: Vehicle width. See LDW/LKA package. Refer to sheet Vehicle parameter

Data.Name: Vehicle_config.P_sys_x_GearboxType
Data.Comment: Gearbox type.

Data.Name: ADB.ADB_enable
Data.Comment: Activation or not of ADB function.

Data.Name: AHL.AHL_enable
Data.Comment: See AHL STR_COMP. Activation or not of AHL function

Data.Name: AHL_tuning.AHL_MAX_ON_COMING_DISTANCE_DUAL
Data.Comment: Minimum detection distance for oncoming vehicle with dual light source

Data.Name: AHL_tuning.AHL_MAX_ON_COMING_DISTANCE_SINGLE
Data.Comment: Minimum detection distance for oncoming vehicle with only one light source.

Data.Name: AHL_tuning.AHL_MAX_LEADING_DISTANCE_DUAL
Data.Comment: See AHL STR_COMP. Minimum detection distance for leading vehicle with dual light source.

Data.Name: AHL_tuning.AHL_MAX_LEADING_DISTANCE_SINGLE
Data.Comment: See AHL STR_COMP. Minimum detection distance for leading vehicle with only one light source.

Data.Name: AHL_tuning.AHL_LIT_AREA_THRES_IN
Data.Comment: See AHL & ADB STR_COMP. Maximum light threshold of lit area, low beam are activated if measured l

Data.Name: AHL_tuning.AHL_LIT_AREA_THRES_OUT
Data.Comment: See AHL & ADB STR_COMP. Minimum light threshold of lit area, high beam are activated if measured

Data.Name: AHL_tuning.AHL_DELAY_OPPOSITE
Data.Comment: See AHL STR_COMP. Commutation delay after crossing an oncoming Target vehicle The resulting dela

Data.Name: AHL_tuning.AHL_DELAY_OVERTAKING
Data.Comment: See AHL STR_COMP. Commutation delay after overtaking an overtaking Target vehicle The resulting

Data.Name: AHL_tuning.AHL_DELAY_LOST
Data.Comment: See AHL STR_COMP. Delay to be applied before switch back to high beam in case target vehicle has

Data.Name: AHL_tuning.AHL_SPEED_THRES_INF
Data.Comment: See AHL STR_COMP. The AHL system shall be deactivated (=Low beam switched ON) below a threshold of

Data.Name: AHL_tuning.AHL_SPEED_THRES_SUP
Data.Comment: See AHL STR_COMP. The AHL system shall be activated above a threshold of speed SPEED_THRES_SUP. F

Data.Name: AHL_tuning.AHL_AMBIENT_LIGHT_THRES_SUP
Data.Comment: See AHL & ADB STR_COMP. Threshold of ambient light to deactivate AHL system.

Data.Name: AHL_tuning.AHL_AMBIENT_LIGHT_THRES_INF
Data.Comment: See AHL & ADB STR_COMP. Threshold of ambient light to activate AHL system.

Data.Name: Country_Code
Data.Comment: Country code

Data.Name: FrCam_Vehicle.Camera_Height
Data.Comment: Camera height from ground *Refer to sheet Vehicle parameter sheet.

Data.Name: FrCam_Vehicle.Distance_camera_front_axle_center
Data.Comment: Longitudinal distance between the camera (middle of the lens) and the front axle center in systems'

Data.Name: FrCam_Vehicle.Distance_front_axle_to_bumper
Data.Comment: Longitudinal distance between front axle origin and systems' referential origin

Data.Name: FrCam_Vehicle.Distance_camera_vehicle_centerline
Data.Comment: Lateral distance between the camera and vehicle center line in systems' referential

Data.Name: Camera_Delta_Height
Data.Comment: Camera height correction value from nominal camera height

Data.Name: Referential.Referential_z_Translation
Data.Comment: Vertical distance between camera's referential origin and systems' referential origin (front bumber)

Data.Name: Vehicle_Speed
Data.Comment: Vehicle's speed when the DTC has been raised.

Data.Name: Snapshot_Vehicle_Warning_State
Data.Comment: Vehicle's state when the DTC has been raised.

Item.Text: SERV and STOP are ON (alert type R3& D3)

Data.Name: Snapshot_Vehicle_Driving_Status
Data.Comment: Vehicle's state when the DTC has been raised.

Item.Text: Vehicle driving, without being able to determine direction

Data.Name: Snapshot_Yaw_Rate
Data.Comment: Yaw rate when the DTC was raised.

Data.Name: Snapshot_Braking_Pressure
Data.Comment: Braking pressure when the DTC was raised.

Data.Name: Snapshot_Blindness_Status
Data.Comment: Blindness status when the DTC has been raised.

Data.Name: Snapshot_Blindness_Timer
Data.Comment: Blindness timer when the DTC has been raised.

Data.Name: Snapshot_Blindness_Mission_Counter
Data.Comment: Blindness mission counter when the DTC has been raised.

Data.Name: Snapshot_Overheating_Status
Data.Comment: Overheating status when the DTC has been raised.

Data.Name: Snapshot_Overheating_Timer
Data.Comment: Overheating timer when the DTC has been raised.

Data.Name: Snapshot_Misalignment_Status
Data.Comment: Misalignment status when the DTC has been raised.

Data.Name: Snapshot_Misalignment_Timer
Data.Comment: Misalignment timer when the DTC has been raised.

Data.Name: Snapshot_Misalignment_Mission_Counter
Data.Comment: Misalignment mission counter when the DTC has been raised.

Data.Name: Snapshot_Out_Of_Focus_Status
Data.Comment: Out of focus status when the DTC has been raised.

Data.Name: Snapshot_Out_Of_Focus_Timer
Data.Comment: Out of focus timer when the DTC has been raised.

Data.Name: Snapshot_Out_Of_Focus_Mission_Counter
Data.Comment: Out of focus mission counter when the DTC has been raised.

Data.Name: EyeQ_Image_Processor_Status
Data.Comment: Indicate EyeQ application Status

Data.Name: EDR_Reading_data
Data.Comment: For EDR (Reading data) Supplier to propose a solution to read data

Data.Name: EDR_Enable
Data.Comment: Enable/disable EDR function

Data.Name: SPC_Config.wmbcTimeoutTime_minSpeed
Data.Comment: (Minimum speed threshold below which driving duration is not counted for TimeoutTime (m/sec))=2

Data.Name: SPC_Config.wmbcTimeoutDist
Data.Comment: Session driving distance before timeout is raised (sec) =-1 , Value -1 disables this feature

Data.Name: SPC_Config.wmbcTimeoutTime
Data.Comment: Session driving duration before timeout is raised (sec))

Data.Name: SPC_Config.SPCMAxattempts
Data.Comment: Maximum number of sessions allowed before timeout is raised

Data.Name: TSR_OSP_config.OSP_TSR_mode
Data.Comment: Activation or not of OSP/TSR function.

Data.Name: TSR_OSP_config.EXTENDED_SIGN_EXT_TRAFFIC_SIGN
Data.Comment: Activation / Deactivation of the overtaking sign.

Item.Text: Extented Traffic Sign zone not active

Data.Name: TSR_OSP_config.EXTENDED_SIGN_COUNT_MODE
Data.Comment: Indicates if the counters must work in time (0) or space (1)

Data.Name: TSR_OSP_config.OSP_NAVSPEEDSELECTION
Data.Comment: configuration to use or not of non-verified speed limit

Item.Text: use of only verified speed limits

Data.Name: TSR_OSP_config.EXTENDED_SIGN_COUNT_GIVEWAY
Data.Comment: counter

Data.Name: TSR_OSP_config.NATIONAL_SPEED_TYPE_COUNTER
Data.Comment: For Nissan, time or distance counter to display de-restriction sign

Data.Name: TSR_OSP_config.EXTERNALTEMPERATURE_STRATEGY
Data.Comment: When ExternalTemperature > (SNOW_MAX_TEMPERATURE) the system shall filter traffic signs with Snow su

Data.Name: TSR_OSP_config.TSR_TRAILER_STRATEGY
Data.Comment: When TrailerPresence = No trailer detected, the system shall filter traffic signs with Trailer subs

Data.Name: TSR_OSP_config.NATIONAL_SPEED_START_ACTIVATION_STATUS
Data.Comment: At new mission, the last TSR/OSP activation status is taken into account or state ON forced

Data.Name: TSR_OSP_config.NATIONAL_SPEED_TYPE_COUNTER_MODE
Data.Comment: For Nissan, to choose counter in time or distance to display de-restriction sign

Data.Name: TSR_OSP_config.EXTENDED_SIGN_COUNT_NOENTRY
Data.Comment: counter

Data.Name: TSR_OSP_config.SL_LINK
Data.Comment: Enable link TSR - CC regarding detected speed limit

Data.Name: TSR_OSP_config.CC_Link
Data.Comment: Enable link TSR - CC regarding detected speed limit

Data.Name: TSR_OSP_config.ACC_Link
Data.Comment: Enable link TSR -> ACC regarding detected speed limit

Data.Name: TSR_OSP_config.EXTENDED_SIGN_COUNT_NOOVERTAKE
Data.Comment: counter

Data.Name: TSR_OSP_config.EXTENDED_SIGN_COUNT_ONEWAY
Data.Comment: counter

Data.Name: TSR_OSP_config.EXTENDED_SIGN_COUNT_STOP
Data.Comment: counter

Data.Name: TSR_OSP_config.PROHIB_WARN_PROHIBITORY_NO_OVERTAKING_SIGN
Data.Comment: Enabling/disabling Detection of Contextual Sign

Data.Name: TSR_OSP_config.PROHIB_WARN_PROHIBITORY_NO_OVERTAKING_HEAVY_GOODS_SIGN
Data.Comment: Enabling/disabling Detection of Contextual Sign

Data.Name: TSR_OSP_config.PROHIB_WARN_WARNING_SLIPPERY_ROAD_SIGN
Data.Comment: Enabling/disabling Detection of Contextual Sign

Data.Name: TSR_OSP_config.PROHIB_WARN_WARNING_CURVE_LEFT_SIGN_
Data.Comment: Enabling/disabling Detection of Contextual Sign

Data.Name: TSR_OSP_config.PROHIB_WARN_WARNING_CURVE_RIGHT_SIGN
Data.Comment: Enabling/disabling Detection of Contextual Sign

Data.Name: TSR_OSP_config.PROHIB_WARN_WARNING_DOUBLE_CURVE_LEFT_SIGN
Data.Comment: Enabling/disabling Detection of Contextual Sign

Data.Name: TSR_OSP_config.PROHIB_WARN_WARNING_DOUBLE_CURVE_RIGHT_SIGN
Data.Comment: Enabling/disabling Detection of Contextual Sign

Data.Name: TSR_OSP_config.PROHIB_WARN_WARNING_CHILDREN_SIGN
Data.Comment: Enabling/disabling Detection of Contextual Sign

Data.Name: TSR_OSP_config.PROHIB_WARN_WARNING_CROSSROADS_SIGN
Data.Comment: Enabling/disabling Detection of Contextual Sign

Data.Name: TSR_OSP_config.PROHIB_WARN_WARNING_ROADWORKS_AHEAD_SIGN
Data.Comment: Enabling/disabling Detection of Contextual Sign

Data.Name: TSR_OSP_config.PROHIB_WARN_WARNING_OTHER_DANGER_SIGN
Data.Comment: Enabling/disabling Detection of Contextual Sign

Data.Name: TSR_OSP_config.PROHIB_WARN_PROHIBITORY_NO_ENTRY_SIGN_
Data.Comment: Enabling/disabling Detection of Contextual Sign

Data.Name: TSR_OSP_config.PROHIB_WARN_PROHIBITORY_NO_TRAILERS_SIGN_
Data.Comment: Enabling/disabling Detection of Contextual Sign

Data.Name: TSR_OSP_config.PROHIB_WARN_PROHIBITORY_CLOSED_ALL_VEHICLES_SIGN
Data.Comment: Enabling/disabling Detection of Contextual Sign

Data.Name: TSR_OSP_config.PROHIB_WARN_PROHIBITORY_NO_MOTOR_VEHICLES_SIGN
Data.Comment: Enabling/disabling Detection of Contextual Sign

Data.Name: TSR_OSP_config.PROHIB_WARN_PROHIBITORY_NO_CAR_SIGN
Data.Comment: Enabling/disabling Detection of Contextual Sign

Data.Name: TSR_OSP_config.PROHIB_WARN_PROHIBITORY_NO_HEAVY_GOODS_SIGN
Data.Comment: Enabling/disabling Detection of Contextual Sign

Data.Name: TSR_OSP_config.PROHIB_WARN_PROHIBITORY_NO_POLLUTANT_SIGN
Data.Comment: Enabling/disabling Detection of Contextual Sign

Data.Name: TSR_OSP_config.PROHIB_WARN_PROHIBITORY_NO_DANGEROUS_SIGN
Data.Comment: Enabling/disabling Detection of Contextual Sign

Data.Name: TSR_OSP_config.PROHIB_WARN_PROHIBITORY_NO_EXPLOSIVES_SIGN
Data.Comment: Enabling/disabling Detection of Contextual Sign

Data.Name: TSR_OSP_config.PROHIB_WARN_PROHIBITORY_NO_BUSES_SIGN
Data.Comment: Enabling/disabling Detection of Contextual Sign

Data.Name: TSR_OSP_config.PROHIB_WARN_PRIORITY_STOP_SIGN
Data.Comment: Enabling/disabling Detection of Contextual Sign

Data.Name: TSR_OSP_config.PROHIB_WARN_WARNING_STOP_AHEAD_SIGN
Data.Comment: Enabling/disabling Detection of Contextual Sign

Data.Name: TSR_OSP_config.PROHIB_WARN_PRIORITY_YIELD_SIGN
Data.Comment: Enabling/disabling Detection of Contextual Sign

Data.Name: TSR_OSP_config.PROHIB_WARN_PRIORITY_YIELD_AHEAD_SIGN
Data.Comment: Enabling/disabling Detection of Contextual Sign

Data.Name: TSR_OSP_config.PROHIB_WARN_SPECIAL_ONE_WAY_SIGN
Data.Comment: Enabling/disabling Detection of Contextual Sign

Data.Name: TSR_OSP_config.PROHIB_WARN_WARNING_TRAFFIC_SIGNALS_AHEAD_SIGN
Data.Comment: Enabling/disabling Detection of Contextual Sign

Data.Name: TSR_OSP_config.PROHIB_WARN_PROHIBITORY_NO_TURN_RED_SIGN
Data.Comment: Enabling/disabling Detection of Contextual Sign

Data.Name: TSR_OSP_config.PROHIB_WARN_PROHIBITORY_NO_UTURN_SIGN
Data.Comment: Enabling/disabling Detection of Contextual Sign

Data.Name: TSR_OSP_config.PROHIB_WARN_PROHIBITORY_NO_LEFT_TURN_SIGN
Data.Comment: Enabling/disabling Detection of Contextual Sign

Data.Name: TSR_OSP_config.PROHIB_WARN_EXTENDED_SIGN_COUNT
Data.Comment: Enabling/disabling Detection of Contextual Sign

Data.Name: TSR_OSP_config.TSRARROW_STRATEGY
Data.Comment: When this strategy = No filter, the system shall filter traffic signs with arrow subsign attached

Data.Name: TSR_OSP_config.TSRSCHOOL_STRATEGY
Data.Comment: When this strategy = No filter, the system shall filter traffic signs with school subsign attached

Data.Name: TSR_OSP_config.TSRTIME_STRATEGY
Data.Comment: When this strategy = No filter. the system shall filter traffic signs with time subsign attached

Data.Name: TSR_OSP_config.TSR_MEMO
Data.Comment: Set if the signal memorization is active or not

Data.Name: TSR_OSP_config.HMI_Strategy
Data.Comment: 3 different strategy, see requirement. The system shall modify the FL0062, FL0019, FL0100, FL0103, F

Data.Name: TSR_OSP_config.TSRGeneric_STRATEGY
Data.Comment: When this strategy = No filter, the system shall filter traffic signs with Generic subsign attache

Data.Name: TSR_OSP_calib.SNOW_MAX_TEMPERATURE
Data.Comment: Temperature threshold for temperature filter (for snow subsign strategy)

Data.Name: TSR_OSP_calib.max_period_intermittent
Data.Comment: Time between two intermittent wiping

Data.Name: TSR_OSP_calib.maxcountwipers
Data.Comment: Number of intermittant wiping

Data.Name: TSR_OSP_calib.rain_active_delay
Data.Comment: Time with rain information from rain sensor

Data.Name: TSR_OSP_calib.rain_not_active_delay
Data.Comment: Time without rain information from rain sensor

Data.Name: TSR_OSP_calib.rain_strategy_selection
Data.Comment: Rain sensor strategy vs wiping counting.

Item.Text: Internal Strategy based on external signal Front Wiping Status

Data.Name: TSR_OSP_calib.SL_LOW_THRESHOLD_KPH
Data.Comment: Speed Limiter. Threshold in KPH before displaying the long press button message.

Data.Name: TSR_OSP_calib.SL_LOW_THRESHOLD_MPH
Data.Comment: Speed Limiter. Threshold in MPH before displaying the long press button message.

Data.Name: TSR_OSP_calib.RECORD_SPEED_THD
Data.Comment: When speedVechicle < Record_Speed_THD, the current value of SpeedLimitZone1 must be memorized

Data.Name: TSR_OSP_calib.Overspeed_detect_time
Data.Comment: Overspeed detection time (hysteresis)

Data.Name: TSR_OSP_calib.Overspeed_tolerance_kmh
Data.Comment: Overspeed tolerance (hysteresis)

Data.Name: TSR_OSP_calib.Overspeed_tolerance_mph
Data.Comment: See TSR/OSP STR_COMP. Overspeed tolerance (hysteresis)

Data.Name: TSR_OSP_calib.Start_detect_rain
Data.Comment: Time with activated wipers

Data.Name: TSR_OSP_calib.Stop_detect_rain
Data.Comment: Time withe deactivated wipers

Data.Name: Delay_After_Turn
Data.Comment: Parameter that keeps displayed in the cluster the sign after a turn

Data.Name: Autofix.Aiming Roll dynamic
Data.Comment: Newly calculated by Autofix

Data.Name: Autofix.Aiming Pitch dynamic
Data.Comment: Newly calculated by Autofix

Data.Name: Autofix.Aiming Yaw dynamic
Data.Comment: Newly calculated by Autofix

Data.Name: Autofix.roll_delta_error
Data.Comment: Difference between factory and autofix roll

Data.Name: Autofix.pitch_delta_error
Data.Comment: Difference between factory and autofix pitch

Data.Name: Autofix.yaw_delta_error
Data.Comment: Difference between factory and autofix roll

Data.Name: Autofix.Autofix_Returned_First_Value
Data.Comment: Binary value stating if autofix returned a value during current driving session (see Renault_Valeo_F

Data.Name: TAC2_Param.targets_separation_distance
Data.Comment: Target Separation Distance

Data.Name: TAC2_Param.targets_distance_to_front_axle
Data.Comment: Target Distance to Front Axle

Data.Name: TAC2_Param.targets_upper_height
Data.Comment: Aiming target upper height (corresponds to Nissan's parameter Htu)

Data.Name: TAC2_Param.targets_lower_height
Data.Comment: Aiming target lower height (corresponds to Nissan's parameter Htl)

Data.Name: TAC2_Param.targets_size
Data.Comment: Aiming target size (elementary shape). Depending if it the targets are circular or square, this valu

Data.Name: TAC2_Param.target_type
Data.Comment: Type of target for end of line and after sale alignment 001 = Horizontal Rects w/ 2 SP --> squared

Data.Name: TAC2_Param.Alignment_Axe_Offset
Data.Comment: Type of alignment : centered / decentered

Data.Name: TIMER.OVER_130_SL_DISPLAY_MAX_DIST
Data.Comment: In TSR mode, duration in distance for the speed limit sign display for sign out of the scope of lega

Data.Name: TIMER.OVER_130_SL_MIN_TIME
Data.Comment: In TSR mode, duration in time for the speed limit sign (with full light) display for sign out of the

Data.Name: TIMER.OVER_130_SL_EXT_TIME
Data.Comment: In TSR mode, duration in time for the speed limit sign with grey display for sign out of the scope o

Data.Name: TIMER.90_130_HW_SL_DISPLAY_MAX_DIST
Data.Comment: In TSR mode, duration in distance for the speed limit sign display.

Data.Name: TIMER.90_130_HW_SL_MIN_TIME
Data.Comment: In TSR mode, duration in time for the speed limit sign (with full light) display.

Data.Name: TIMER.90_130_HW_SL_EXT_TIME
Data.Comment: In TSR mode, duration in time for the speed limit sign with grey display.

Data.Name: TIMER.90_130_NOT_HW_SL_DISPLAY_MAX_DIST
Data.Comment: In TSR mode, duration in distance for the speed limit sign display.

Data.Name: TIMER.90_130_NOT_HW_SL_MIN_TIME
Data.Comment: In TSR mode, duration in time for the speed limit sign (with full light) display.

Data.Name: TIMER.90_130_NOT_HW_SL_EXT_TIME
Data.Comment: In TSR mode, duration in time for the speed limit sign with grey display.

Data.Name: TIMER.60_80_HW_SL_DISPLAY_MAX_DIST
Data.Comment: In TSR mode, duration in distance for the speed limit sign display.

Data.Name: TIMER.60_80_HW_SL_MIN_TIME
Data.Comment: In TSR mode, duration in time for the speed limit sign (with full light) display.

Data.Name: TIMER.60_80_HW_SL_EXT_TIME
Data.Comment: In TSR mode, duration in time for the speed limit sign with grey display.

Data.Name: TIMER.60_80_NOT_HW_SL_DISPLAY_MAX_DIST
Data.Comment: In TSR mode, duration in distance for the speed limit sign display.

Data.Name: TIMER.60_80_NOT_HW_SL_MIN_TIME
Data.Comment: In TSR mode, duration in time for the speed limit sign (with full light) display.

Data.Name: TIMER.60_80_NOT_HW_SL_EXT_TIME
Data.Comment: In TSR mode, duration in time for the speed limit sign with grey display.

Data.Name: TIMER.10_50_NO_HW_SL_DISPLAY_MAX_DIST
Data.Comment: In TSR mode, duration in distance for the speed limit sign display.

Data.Name: TIMER.10_50_HW_SL_DISPLAY_MAX_DIST
Data.Comment: In TSR mode, duration in distance for the speed limit sign display.

Data.Name: TIMER.10_50_HW_SL_MIN_TIME
Data.Comment: In TSR mode, duration in time for the speed limit sign (with full light) display.

Data.Name: TIMER.10_50_HW_SL_EXT_TIME
Data.Comment: In TSR mode, duration in time for the speed limit sign with grey display.

Data.Name: TIMER.10_50_NOT_HW_SL_MIN_TIME
Data.Comment: In TSR mode, duration in time for the speed limit sign (with full light) display.

Data.Name: TIMER.10_50_NOT_HW_SL_EXT_TIME
Data.Comment: In TSR mode, duration in time for the speed limit sign with grey display.

Data.Name: TIMER.ENDOF_HW_SL_DISPLAY_MAX_DIST
Data.Comment: In TSR mode, duration in distance for the end of speed limit sign display.

Data.Name: TIMER.ENDOF_HW_SL_MIN_TIME
Data.Comment: In TSR mode, duration in time for the end of speed limit sign (with full light) display.

Data.Name: TIMER.ENDOF_HW_SL_EXT_TIME
Data.Comment: In TSR mode, duration in time for the end of speed limit sign with grey display.

Data.Name: TIMER.ENDOF_NOT_HW_SL_DISPLAY_MAX_DIST
Data.Comment: In TSR mode, duration in distance for the end of speed limit sign display.

Data.Name: TIMER.ENDOF_NOT_HW_SL_MIN_TIME
Data.Comment: In TSR mode, duration in time for the end of speed limit sign (with full light) display.

Data.Name: TIMER.ENDOF_NOT_HW_SL_EXT_TIME
Data.Comment: In TSR mode, duration in time for the end of speed limit sign with grey display.

Data.Name: TIMER.SCHOOL_ZONE_DIST
Data.Comment: This is distance for US School zone sign.

Data.Name: TIMER.SCHOOL_ZONE_TIME
Data.Comment: This is timer for US School zone sign.

Data.Name: TIMER.90_130_HW
Data.Comment: For fusion in OSP mode, duration in distance for the speed limit sign detect

Data.Name: TIMER.60_80_HW
Data.Comment: See TSR/OSP STR_COMP. For fusion in OSP mode, duration in distance for the speed limit sign detect

Data.Name: TIMER.10_50_HW
Data.Comment: See TSR/OSP STR_COMP. For fusion in OSP mode, duration in distance for the speed limit sign detect

Data.Name: TIMER.90_130_NOT_HW
Data.Comment: See TSR/OSP STR_COMP. For fusion in OSP mode, duration in distance for the speed limit sign detect

Data.Name: TIMER.60_80_NOT_HW
Data.Comment: See TSR/OSP STR_COMP. For fusion in OSP mode, duration in distance for the speed limit sign detect

Data.Name: TIMER.10_50_NOT_HW
Data.Comment: See TSR/OSP STR_COMP. For fusion in OSP mode, duration in distance for the speed limit sign detect

Data.Name: TIMER.SL_WITH_SUPP
Data.Comment: Speed Limit. For fusion in OSP mode, duration in time for the speed limit sign with subsign detected

Data.Name: TSR_FILTER.TSR_CANCEL_BY_TURNSIGNAL
Data.Comment: This parameter is activate TURN SIGNAL CANCEL LOGIC

Data.Name: TSR_FILTER.ACTIVATE
Data.Comment: This parameter is activate FILTER logic

Data.Name: TSR_FILTER.NOTHW_EGO_SPEED
Data.Comment: This parameter is speed threshold for judging NOTHW

Data.Name: TSR_FILTER.HW_EGO_SPEED
Data.Comment: This parameter is speed threshold for judging HW

Data.Name: TSR_FILTER.NOTHW_ADJACENT_SIGN_POSITION_TRESH_LEFT
Data.Comment: This parameter is filtering distance threshold for adjament lane sign at NOT HW

Data.Name: TSR_FILTER.NOTHW_ADJACENT_SIGN_POSITION_TRESH_RIGHT
Data.Comment: This parameter is filtering distance threshold for adjament lane sign at NOT HW

Data.Name: TSR_FILTER.HW_ADJACENT_SIGN_POSITION_TRESH_LEFT
Data.Comment: This parameter is filtering distance threshold for adjament lane sign at HW

Data.Name: TSR_FILTER.HW_ADJACENT_SIGN_POSITION_TRESH_RIGHT
Data.Comment: This parameter is filtering distance threshold for adjament lane sign at HW

Data.Name: TSR_FILTER.SIGN_HEIGHT_POSITION_TRESH
Data.Comment: This parameter is filtering distance threshold for height

Data.Name: TSR_FILTER.HW_ELECTSIGN_POSITION_HEIGHT_TRESH
Data.Comment: This parameter is filtering distance threshold for height

Data.Name: TSR_FILTER.SIZE_TRESH
Data.Comment: This parameter is filtering distance threshold for pixel

Data.Name: TSR_FILTER.Filter_Yellow_Sign
Data.Comment: REQ_SYS_TSR-OSP_Design_FrontCam_907

Item.Text: No filter and send it in Zone1 parameter of CAN without subSign
No filter and send it in zone2 parameter of CAN without subSign
No filter and send it in zone2 parameter of CAN and add arrow or Generic Subsign according to the case

Data.Name: LDW_Config.Conf.Min_Lane_Width
Data.Comment: This is minimum Lane width of LDW activation.

Data.Name: LDW_Config.Early_bool_LDW_Config.warnings_on
Data.Comment: This is bool_ldw_warnings_on (EyeQ LDW Early setting)

Data.Name: LDW_Config.Middle_bool_LDW_Config.warnings_on
Data.Comment: This is bool_ldw_warnings_on (EyeQ LDW Middle setting)

Data.Name: LDW_Config.Late_bool_LDW_Config.warnings_on
Data.Comment: This is bool_ldw_warnings_on (EyeQ LDW Late setting)

Data.Name: LDW_Config.Early_corridor_outer_boundary
Data.Comment: This is corridor_outer_boundary setting (EyeQ LDW Early setting)

Data.Name: LDW_Config.Early_inner_curve_tlc_reduced
Data.Comment: This is the reduction of TLC (Time to Line Crossing) during driving in curve. (EyeQ LDW Early sett

Data.Name: LDW_Config.Early_inner_reset_offset
Data.Comment: This is inner reset offset threshold (EyeQ LDW Early setting)

Data.Name: LDW_Config.Early_outer_distance_to_terminate_warning
Data.Comment: This is outer distance to terminate warning setting (EyeQ LDW Early setting)

Data.Name: LDW_Config.Early_position_warning_distance_threshold
Data.Comment: This is position_warning_distance_threshold (EyeQ LDW Early setting)

Data.Name: LDW_Config.Early_tlc
Data.Comment:
This is the TLC (Time to Line Crossing) threshold.
TLC is the predection time of leading front

Data.Name: LDW_Config.Early_warning_line_tlc
Data.Comment: This is the disance thershold of (EyeQ LDW Early setting)

Data.Name: LDW_Config.Middle_corridor_outer_boundary
Data.Comment: This is corridor_outer_boundary setting (EyeQ LDW Middle setting)

Data.Name: LDW_Config.Middle_inner_curve_tlc_reduced
Data.Comment: This is the reduction of TLC (Time to Line Crossing) during driving in curve. (EyeQ LDW Middle set

Data.Name: LDW_Config.Middle_inner_reset_offset
Data.Comment: This is inner reset offset threshold (EyeQ LDW Middle setting)

Data.Name: LDW_Config.Middle_outer_distance_to_terminate_warning
Data.Comment: This is outer distance to terminate warning setting (EyeQ LDW Middle setting)

Data.Name: LDW_Config.Middle_position_warning_distance_threshold
Data.Comment: This is position_warning_distance_threshold (EyeQ LDW Middle setting)

Data.Name: LDW_Config.Middle_tlc
Data.Comment:
This is the TLC (Time to Line Crossing) threshold.
TLC is the predection time of leading front

Data.Name: LDW_Config.Middle_warning_line_tlc
Data.Comment: This is the disance thershold of (EyeQ LDW Middle setting)

Data.Name: LDW_Config.Late_corridor_outer_boundary
Data.Comment: This is corridor_outer_boundary setting (EyeQ LDW Late setting)

Data.Name: LDW_Config.Late_inner_curve_tlc_reduced
Data.Comment: This is the reduction of TLC (Time to Line Crossing) during driving in curve. (EyeQ LDW Late setti

Data.Name: LDW_Config.Late_inner_reset_offset
Data.Comment: This is inner reset offset threshold (EyeQ LDW Late setting)

Data.Name: LDW_Config.Late_outer_distance_to_terminate_warning
Data.Comment: This is outer distance to terminate warning setting (EyeQ LDW Late setting)

Data.Name: LDW_Config.Late_position_warning_distance_threshold
Data.Comment: This is position_warning_distance_threshold (EyeQ LDW Late setting)

Data.Name: LDW_Config.Late_tlc
Data.Comment:
This is the TLC (Time to Line Crossing) threshold.
TLC is the predection time of leading front

Data.Name: LDW_Config.Late_warning_line_tlc
Data.Comment: This is the disance thershold of (EyeQ LDW Late setting)

Data.Name: Plant_Alignment_recorder_DID.Mileage
Data.Comment: Last alignment before after sale, static, in plant, permamanently recorded as first good alignment r

Data.Name: Plant_Alignment_recorder_DID.Routine_result
Data.Comment: Last alignment before after sale, static, in plant, permamanently recorded as first good alignment r

Data.Name: Plant_Alignment_recorder_DID.Angles_Roll
Data.Comment: Last alignment before after sale, static, in plant, permamanently recorded as first good alignment r

Data.Name: Plant_Alignment_recorder_DID.Angles_Picth
Data.Comment: Last alignment before after sale, static, in plant, permamanently recorded as first good alignment r

Data.Name: Plant_Alignment_recorder_DID.Angles_Yaw
Data.Comment: Last alignment before after sale, static, in plant, permamanently recorded as first good alignment r

Data.Name: Aftersales_Alignment_recorder_DID.Counter_0
Data.Comment: # alignment record performed in after sales

Data.Name: DTC_reactivity.CameraDevDTCActivation
Data.Comment: A DID to activate/deactivate the dev related DTCs

Data.Name: Ignition_Cycles
Data.Comment: This DID is used to monitor how many time the ignition cycles the unit has had. It is used for debu

Data.Name: Supplier_TSR_DID.SubsignZone1_b
Data.Comment: "Activation or deactivation of Subsign display in Zone 1. Default for SUV equal to 0 since Subsign_Z

Data.Name: Supplier_TSR_DID.OutputRestrictedZone1_b
Data.Comment: Activation or deactivation of displaying Speed Limits with Supplementaries with Category Subsign di

Data.Name: Supplier_TSR_DID.ActivateSchoolStrategy_b
Data.Comment: Activation or deactivation of School supplementary strategy. For CDV default value is 0 since the S

Data.Name: Supplier_TSR_DID.ActivateExtendedTrafficSigns_b
Data.Comment: Activation or deactivation of Extended Traffic signs. For both Platforms default value is equal to

Data.Name: Supplier_Fault_Code
Data.Comment: defined by supplier. Check MDT list in ZF area\Documents\07 Diagnostic\Failsafe

Data.Name: Fingerprint
Data.Comment: See (DRC14) for details.

Data.Name: IndexSrvData
Data.Comment: See (DRC14) for details. 10 bit max

Data.Name: Operational_Reference
Data.Comment: See (DRC14) for details.

Data.Name: Snapshot_DTC_Mileage_Last_Occurence
Data.Comment: See (DRC14) for details. Mileage at the DTC's last occurrence since last clearance.

Data.Name: Snapshot_DTC_Occurence_Counter
Data.Comment: See (DRC14) for details. Counts the occurrence of the DTC since last clearance.

Data.Name: BootVersion
Data.Comment: See (DRC14) for details.

Data.Name: Vehicle_config.Vehicle_Type
Data.Comment: Use to be "Vehicle variant". Now used to activate/deactivate EyeQ reset strategy to re-synchro times

Data.Name: VIN
Data.Comment: See (DRC14)

Data.Name: vehicleManufacturerECUHardwareNumber
Data.Comment: See (DRC14)

Data.Name: systemSupplierECUHardwareNumber
Data.Comment: See ISO 14229 for details

Data.Name: systemSupplierECUSoftwareVersionNumber
Data.Comment: 32 bytes max. See (DRC14) for details.

Data.Name: diagnosticVersion
Data.Comment: See (DRC14) for details.

Data.Name: vehicleManufacturerSparePartNumber
Data.Comment: Ordered Part Number - This value shall contain the number of the part ordered by OEM
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the vehicle manufacturer spare part number.

Record data content and format shall be server specific and defined by the vehicle manufacturer.

Data.Name: ConfigurationDataReferenceAfterConfigurationProcess
Data.Comment: See (DRC14) for details.

Data.Name: Digest_EYEQ_FFS
Data.Comment: See (DRC14) for details.

Data.Name: Digest_NVM
Data.Comment: See (DRC14) for details.

Data.Name: Digest_EYEQ_MEST
Data.Comment: See (DRC14) for details.

Data.Name: Digest_APPL0
Data.Comment: See (DRC14) for details.

Data.Name: Digest_BTL0
Data.Comment: See (DRC14) for details.

Data.Name: Digest_BTL1
Data.Comment: See (DRC14) for details.

Data.Name: Digest_EYEQ_Boot
Data.Comment: See (DRC14) for details.

Data.Name: RoutineStatus
Data.Comment: Routine Status (Routine Info)

Data.Name: Alignment_Result_Yaw
Data.Comment: Aiming Yaw Result (For Normal Mode, this result for Yaw.)

Data.Name: Alignment_Result_Roll
Data.Comment: Aiming Roll Result (For Normal Mode, this result for Roll.)

Data.Name: Alignment_Result_Pitch
Data.Comment: Aiming Pitch Result (For Normal Mode, this result for Pitch.)

Data.Name: FLCAlignData.targets_upper_height
Data.Comment: Aiming target upper height (corresponds to Nissan's parameter Htu)

Data.Name: FLCAlignData.targets_lower_height
Data.Comment: Aiming target lower height (corresponds to Nissan's parameter Htl)

Data.Name: FLCAlignData.targets_distance_to_front_axle
Data.Comment: Target Distance to Front Axle

Data.Name: FLCAlignData.targets_size
Data.Comment: Aiming target size (elementary shape). Depending if it the targets are circular or square, this valu

Data.Name: FLCAlignData.targets_separation_distance
Data.Comment: Target Separation Distance

Data.Name: Vehicle_type.Vehicle_type
Data.Comment: "Vehicle variant. is used by LSS model"

Data.Name: Camera_Delta_Height.Camera_Delta_Height_bis
Data.Comment: Camera height correction value from nominal camera height

Item.Text: Device and failure type ODB codding
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal bias level out of range / zero adj. failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
Component or sys. operation obstructed or blocked

Data.Name: DTCFaultDetectionCounter
Data.Comment: DTC fault detction counter

Data.Name: ECUSerialNumber
Data.Comment: See (DRC14) for details.

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.AgingCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData AgingCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.DTCOccurrenceCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData DTCOccurenceCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.Mileage
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData Mileage (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCCount
Data.Comment: DTC count

Data.Name: DTCFormatIdentifier
Data.Comment: DTC format - Renault/Nissan use value 0 (3 bytes DTC)

Data.Name: systemSupplierIdentifier
Data.Comment: Name and address information of the supplier.
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the system supplier name and address information.

Record data content and format shall be server specific and defined by the system supplier.

Data.Name: TAC2_Response
Data.Comment: Aiming negative response reason. Check aiming flow

Data.Name: SPC_Response
Data.Comment: Aiming negative response reason. Check aiming flow

Item.Text: Pause: Internal Reason & Radius & Low Speed
Pause: Internal Reason & Radius & High Speed
Pause: Internal Reason & Acceleration & Low Speed
Pause: Internal Reason & Acceleration & High Speed
Pause: Internal Reason & Acceleration & Radius & Low Speed
Pause: Internal Reason & Acceleration & Radius & High Speed

Data.Name: systemSupplierECUSoftwareNumber
Data.Comment: Software Number (Supplier)
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the system supplier specific ECU (server) software number.

Record data content and format shall be server specific and defined by the system supplier.

Data.Name: OutputPermanentControlList
Data.Comment: List of Data Identifiers for Input Output Control - The list defined here is AN EXAMPLE.
Data.Description:
Definition of IOControl

Data: IOCTL.DataIdentifierList

  Contains the list of all IO devices that may be
  controlled by InputOutputControl service.
 
  Example:
 
    0 - DID_Pump
    1 - DID_Wiper

If some of these IO devices have parameters, you should defined a data with the same name as the IO devices followed by a dot and a text

  Example:
 
  Data: DID_Wiper.Mode
     Type: List
       0 - Slow speed
       1 - High speed

Then, you should add theses data in the "Send tab" of the InputOutpuControl request, after the IOCTL.OptionRecord.Parameter data.

Data.Name: OutputControlCommand
Data.Comment: Input Output control parameter list

Data.Name: RoutineControlType
Data.Comment: Routine control type - VALUES OTHER THAN 1, 2 & 3 ARE RESERVED AND SHOULD NOT BE USED.

Data.Name: RoutineIdentifierList
Data.Comment: Routine identifier - This is an example. See documentation for more information.
Data.Description:
Definition of RoutineControl

Data: RoutineIdentifierList

  Contains the list of all routine identifier that may be used with InputOutputControl service.
 
  Example:
  
    0x4501 - ROUTINE_Temperature_Wave

If some of these routine identifer have parameters, you should defined a data with the same name as the routine identifer followed by a dot and a text

  Example:
 
  Data: ROUTINE_Temperature_Wave.Min
  Data: ROUTINE_Temperature_Wave.Max
  Data: ROUTINE_Temperature_Wave.Freq

Then, you should add theses data in the "Send tab" of the RoutineControl request, after the RoutineIdentifierList data.

Data.Name: FrCam_Vehicle.Camera_Bottom_pixel
Data.Comment: Masking area in FOV from bottom side (This value specify quarter resolution of vertical FOV.)

Data.Name: RoutineStatusRecord.RoutineInfo
Data.Comment: Routine information

Data.Name: FakeDIDToSolveOutputControlCheck
Data.Comment: FakeDIDToSolveOutputControlCheck

Data.Name: IOCTL.DataIdentifier
Data.Comment: Data Identifier received in reply to InputOutputControl request

Data.Name: Heater_Element_speedStrategy.Activation_Vehicle_Speed_A
Data.Comment: Vehicle speed to activate/deactivate the heater element. [FRCAM-TS]_[SUV]_RFQ_Front_Camera.

Data.Name: Heater_Element_speedStrategy.Activation_Vehicle_Speed_B
Data.Comment: Vehicle speed to activate/deactivate the heater element. [FRCAM-TS]_[SUV]_RFQ_Front_Camera.

Data.Name: IOCTL.StatusRecord.Parameter
Data.Comment: Input Output control status

Request.Name: TesterPresent.WithResponse
Request.Comment: This request enable P2P tester present for tool (Screen, IOctl, ...)

Request.Name: ReportDTCInformation.ReportDTCFaultDetectionCounter
Request.Comment: Report DTC fault detection

Request.Name: ReportDTCInformation.ReportDTCFaultDetectionCounter_CPDD Import
Request.Comment: Report DTC fault detection counter counter for Clip import

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportSupportedDTC
Request.Comment: Report supported DTC

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportSupportedDTC_CPDD Import
Request.Comment: Report supported DTC for Clip import

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000 nor for Clip import

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportSnapshot
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / Clip import : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportDTCSnapshotIdentification
Request.Comment: Report snapshot identification

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportDTC
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / DDT : Unusable for Clip import

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportDTC_CPDD Import
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / Clip import : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportNumberOfDTCByStatusMask
Request.Comment: Report number of DTC

Request.Name: ClearDiagnosticInformation.All
Request.Comment: The ClearDiagnosticInformation service is used by the tool to clear diagnostic information in an ECUs memory

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession.ExtendedDiagnostic
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession.Programming
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession.Default
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Request.Name: DataRead.vehicleManufacturerSparePartNumber
Request.Comment: Read vehicleManufacturerSparePartNumber

Request.Name: DataRead.vehicleManufacturerECUSoftwareNumber
Request.Comment: Read autoconfigurationFingerPrint

Request.Name: DataRead.systemSupplierIdentifier
Request.Comment: Read systemSupplierIdentifier

Request.Name: DataRead.systemSupplierECUSoftwareNumber
Request.Comment: Read systemSupplierECUSoftwareNumber

Request.Name: RC_Aiming_AfterSales_Static.Request_Result
Request.Comment: Start Aiming Routine - Check Mode

Request.Name: RC_Aiming_Check.Request_Result
Request.Comment: Request Result Aiming Routine - Check Mode

Request.Name: RC_Aiming_Check.Start
Request.Comment: Start Aiming Routine - Check Mode

Request.Name: RC_Aiming_Plant_Static.Start
Request.Comment: Start Aiming Routine - Plant

Request.Name: RC_Aiming_Plant_Static.Status
Request.Comment: Request Result Aiming - Normal Mode

Request.Name: RC_Aiming_Reset.Request_Result
Request.Comment: Request Result Aiming Routine - Reset to Initial Mode

Request.Name: RC_Aiming_Reset.Start
Request.Comment: Start Aiming Routine - Reset to Initial Mode

Request.Name: RC_Aiming_SPC.Start
Request.Comment: Start SPC Routine

Request.Name: RC_Aiming_SPC.Status
Request.Comment: Request Result SPC Routine

Request.Name: RC_Aiming_TAC2_AfterSales_Static.Start
Request.Comment: Start Aiming Routine - Check Mode

Request.Name: RC_EDR_Reset.Request_Result
Request.Comment: the purpose of this routine is to erase all the EDR Flash memory.

Request.Name: RC_EDR_Reset.Start
Request.Comment: the purpose of this routine is to erase all the EDR Flash memory.

Request.Name: RC_EDR_Reset.Stop
Request.Comment: the purpose of this routine is to erase all the EDR Flash memory.

Request.Name: RoutineControl
Request.Comment: You should remove ROUTINE_Temperature_Wave.xxx data. These are examples.

Request.Name: DataRead.Heater_Element_speedStrategy
Request.Comment: Read Heater_Element_speedStrategy

Request.Name: DataWrite.Heater_Element_speedStrategy
Request.Comment: Write Heater_Element_speedStrategy

Label.Text: Write Camera and vehicle parameters according to your needs
Init screen and press stop button
Now, perform CODING => See Coding screen
Set "ECU not configured" first and "ECU configured" then. This transition unblocks coding, otherwise NACK22 - execution conditions not set !!!
After Reset, read EyeQ_Status until it changes from unknow to DV_mode or Vision_Mode => OK. The DTC configuration should be not present anymore now
Check coding type is triggered by routine. If not, change it
Set ECU not configured and ECU not caibrated
Coding must be done AFTER CONFIGURATION. see Config screen
Init screen and press stop button
1: if never configured or parameters changed
Leave all zeros. simply launch the routine

Button.Text: Request Aiming Routine Results - Normal Mode

Label.Text: 1: if never configured or parameters changed
yaw rate and vehicle speed read under test

Initialise the screen with the green button,then click on programming session button, then click on the locker icon to unlock the ECU, check on the log that ECU is unlocked, and then click on the button writeFDXX
